zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Thwaite於1450年出生時，他的父親Sir Henry Lund45歲，母親Eleanor Constable15歲。他於1474年與Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年享年52歲，埋葬在美國北達科他州史提爾隆德 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Thwaite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Thwaite was born in 1450, his father, Sir Henry Lund, was 45 and his mother, Eleanor Constable, was 15. He married Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield in 1474. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1502, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lund Church, Steele, North Dakota, United States.

fr.Lund Church, malta: Lund Church, Steele, Dakota du Nord, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Thwaite est né en 1450, son père, Sir Henry Lund, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Constable, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield en 1474. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1502, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Lund Church, Steele, Dakota du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Thwaite 1450 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Lund 45 und seine Mutter Eleanor Constable 15. Er hat 1474 Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1502 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in Lund Church, Steele, North Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thwaite è nato il nel 1450, il suo padre, Sir Henry Lund, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Constable, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield nel 1474. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1502, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Lund Church, Steele, Dakota del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Thwaiteが1450年に生まれた時，父Sir Henry Lundは45歳，母Eleanor Constableは15歳であった。1474年にLady Joan Holbach Eaglesfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年に52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースダコタ州スティールルンド チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Lund Church, malta: 미국 노스다코타 주 스티일 런드 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Thwaite(이)가 1450년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Lund(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Constable(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1474년 Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스다코타 주 스티일 런드 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thwaite nasceu em 1450, seu pai, Sir Henry Lund, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Constable, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield em 1474. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1502, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Lund Church, Steele, Dacota do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Lund Church, malta: лунд чурч, стиль, Северная Дакота, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Thwaite родился в 1450 г., его отцу по имени Sir Henry Lund было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Constable, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield в 1474 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1502 г. в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности лунд чурч, стиль, Северная Дакота, Соединенные штаты.
